name: @service-ai/db
description: Service.AI database package — Drizzle ORM schema and migrations

scripts.db:migrate: psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/0001_health_checks.sql -f migrations/0002_tenancy_franchise.sql -f migrations/0003_rls_policies.sql -f migrations/0004_invitations.sql -f migrations/0005_customer_job.sql -f migrations/0006_pricebook.sql -f migrations/0007_invoices_push.sql -f migrations/0008_payments_stripe.sql -f migrations/0009_royalty.sql -f migrations/0010_ai_voice.sql -f migrations/0011_ai_dispatcher.sql -f migrations/0012_ai_tech_assistant.sql -f migrations/0013_ai_collections.sql
scripts.db:migrate:down: psql $DATABASE_URL -f migrations/0013_ai_collections.down.sql -f migrations/0012_ai_tech_assistant.down.sql -f migrations/0011_ai_dispatcher.down.sql -f migrations/0010_ai_voice.down.sql -f migrations/0009_royalty.down.sql -f migrations/0008_payments_stripe.down.sql -f migrations/0007_invoices_push.down.sql -f migrations/0006_pricebook.down.sql -f migrations/0005_customer_job.down.sql -f migrations/0004_invitations.down.sql -f migrations/0003_rls_policies.down.sql -f migrations/0002_tenancy_franchise.down.sql -f migrations/0001_health_checks.down.sql
